human_use.rationale: The Artifact is a human-operated mobile checkout. Its success depends on discoverability, navigation, input burden, error recovery, feedback, accessibility, touch ergonomics, interruption recovery, perceived latency, destructive-action safety, and cognitive load across cross-disability use.

heartbeats.message: Fresh cached-Python-Playwright contexts completed in required A, B, C order; transcripts and screenshots recorded.
Raw qualitative records, pairwise preferences, and manifest-ready records written; no aggregation or Champion decision made.

objective_reports: All passed and were not overridden.
